title: proptest-multi-issue-generator: foundation for multi-stage prop generators
body:
# Goal

Extend the proptest harness at `crates/jjf-storage/tests/proptest_harness.rs`
with a multi-stage generator that creates N issues in a fresh repo, then
drafts further records that can reference real, extant issue ids. This is
the foundation for two follow-up properties (`proptest-list-ready-monotone`
and `proptest-cycle-rejection`) that need to assert invariants across a
dep-graph rather than a single issue.

# Why now

The MVP harness in `28e5ed71` set `IssueDraft.dependencies = Vec::new()`
because drafting deps requires already-extant target ids — a single-stage
strategy can't supply them. Every follow-up that exercises the dep surface
needs this primitive.

# Approach

- New strategy: `multi_issue_repo_strategy(n: Range<usize>) -> impl Strategy<Value = (Storage, Vec<IssueId>)>`. Generates N drafts (1..=N), creates them in order against a fresh scratch repo, returns the storage handle plus the list of minted ids.
- Second-stage dep generator: given the id list, produce 0..=K random `(child_idx, parent_idx, kind)` triples to apply via `add_dep_edge`. Must avoid trivial self-edges and cycles (the cycle property tests the latter explicitly; for THIS generator, prune cycle-introducing edges so the base round-trip stays clean).
- Reuse `fresh_scratch_repo`, `pin_clock`, `draft_strategy` as already wired.
- Extend Property 1 (round-trip) to opt into this generator for a small N (e.g. 1..=4 issues) so dep edges round-trip too.

# References

- Parent: `df74809` (qa-proptest-harness), commit `28e5ed71`.
- Existing harness: `crates/jjf-storage/tests/proptest_harness.rs`.
- Dep verb implementation: `add_dep_edge` in `crates/jjf-storage/src/lib.rs`.

# Acceptance

- `multi_issue_repo_strategy` lands as a public-in-test helper.
- One property using it ships green (extended Property 1 is the natural first home; standalone is also fine).
- Wall-clock for `cargo test --release -p jjf-storage proptest_harness` stays under ~30s with default `cases: 16`.

# Blocks

- `proptest-list-ready-monotone` (Property 4).
- `proptest-cycle-rejection`.
